text: MINISTRY OF IJRBAN DEVELOPMENT @irectorate of Estates) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, tbe l0th April, 2017 G.S.R. 33t(E).- In exercise of the F)wers conferred by section l8 of the Public Premises (Eviaion of Unauthsised Occupans) Act, l97l (40 of l97l), fte Cenral Government hereby makes the following rules frrtter to amend the Public Premises (Eviction of Unauthorised Occupants) Rules, 1971, namely:- (l) Thsse rules may be called the Public Premises (Eviction of Unauthorised Occupants) Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazntte. 2. In the Public Premises (Eviction of Unauthorised Occupants) Rules, 1971,- (i) in FORM A. in the entries * (asterisk) occurring at the end, for the words "a date not earlier than seven days', the words "a date not later than seven days" slrall be substituted; (ii) in FORM D, E, F and G, for the words "simple interest", the words "compound interest" shall be substituted; and (iii)in FORM D, in fourth paragraph, for the words "on or before the........... rvhy", the words and brackets "on or before the ........... (not later than seven days) why" shall be substituted; (iv) in FORM F, in fourth paragraph, for the words "on or before the why", the words and brackets "on or before the ........... (not later than seven days) why'' shall be substituted. lF.No.2 I 0 1 3 l7 DA04P ol.I(Vol.v)I DHARMENDRA, Jt. Secy. Note.- The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide notification number G.S.R.1883, dated the l3s December, l97l and subsequently amended vide notification numbers G.S.R.741, dated the 8e August, 1981; G.S.R.lll4(E), dated the 29o September, 1986; and G.S.R.3(E), dated the 2nd January, 1998.
